calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Capital One Bank (USA) NA.,
No appearance by Defendant Michael A. Kroll.
Copy of Declaration of Plaintiff in lieu of personal testimony at trial (CCP 98), was presented in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal - $1,543.51
Attorney Fees - $1,575.00
Costs - $289.50
Interest - $357.53
Total - $3,765.54

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Set For Trial On Feb-14-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
